ambiguities.description: What entities, relationships, and boundaries define this system?
How do users and processes interact with the system over time?
What rules, constraints, and compliance requirements apply?
What external systems, integrations, and deployment constraints exist?
What defines MVP, done, and out-of-scope for this construction?
Target customer/user segments (B2B, B2C, vertical, horizontal)
Tenant model (shared schema, isolated schema, hybrid)
Auth and identity model ( SSO, password, magic link, MFA)
Onboarding and activation flow (self-serve, sales-led, hybrid)
Admin roles and permission model (RBAC, ABAC, custom)
Observability and support model (self-service, dedicated support, hybrid)
Compliance and security requirements (SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, etc.)
MVP boundary: which tenants, features, and geographies are in scope

questions.question: What does success look like for this system?
Who are the primary users and what is the organization size?
What is the timeline and what constraints (budget, compliance, team) apply?
Who is the target customer? B2B, B2C, or vertical-specific?
What tenant isolation model is required?
Is onboarding self-serve, sales-led, or hybrid?
What auth methods must be supported?

assumptions.assumption: Web-based application is the primary delivery form

suggested_closures.decision: SaaS construction will follow a tenant-aware architecture with explicit isolation boundaries.
suggested_closures.rationale: Tenant isolation is foundational to SaaS and affects every layer of the system.

seed_tasks.title: Define system scope and success criteria
seed_tasks.transformation: Document what the system must do, for whom, and what success looks like.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: A written scope document exists and has been reviewed.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: A third party can understand the scope without asking clarifying questions.

seed_tasks.title: Identify constraints and non-goals
seed_tasks.transformation: Explicitly list budget, timeline, compliance, and out-of-scope items.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: No hidden constraints remain that would invalidate the construction plan.

seed_tasks.title: Define tenant model and isolation strategy
seed_tasks.transformation: Choose and document the tenant isolation model and its implications.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Tenant model decision is documented with trade-offs.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: A developer can implement tenant isolation from the document alone.

seed_tasks.title: Define customer segments and onboarding flow
seed_tasks.transformation: Document target segments and how each segment is onboarded.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Each segment has a defined path from signup to value.

seed_tasks.title: Define billing and subscription model
seed_tasks.transformation: Document pricing tiers, billing events, and subscription lifecycle.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Billing model is documented with state machine.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Billing logic covers signup, upgrade, downgrade, and cancellation.

residuals.description: System scope and success criteria are not yet defined by the principal.
Constraints, compliance requirements, and non-goals have not been documented.
Tenant isolation model is not selected.
